summary: Pre-existing pipe error in tool.ts execute pipeline affects all tool.execute() calls
detail: The tool execution pipeline in packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts has a runtime TypeError: 'args[1] is not a function' in Pipeable.js:31 when tool.execute() is called. This affects ALL tool tests (confirmed in duckdb-query.test.ts and tool-telemetry.test.ts). The error occurs deep in the effect pipeline chain during tap/tapError/orDie layer composition. Likely introduced by the recent ToolCache commit (09e949bd6c) that changed internal Effect composition. Tests that only use Tool.define()/init() without calling .execute() pass fine. Tests calling .execute() fail with exit code 1.
